headline: Polygon Axes Staff After $170M Coinme Deal

article.title: Polygon CEO announces job cuts amid Coinme acquisition
article.summary: The round of layoffs was part of Polygon transitioning operations to payments following a $250 million deal to acquire Coinme and Sequence in January.

headline: $100K Bet on Kalshi Markets Sparks Crypto Volatility

article.title: Trump teleprompter operator made $100K betting on Kalshi markets tied to speeches: ABC
article.summary: According to ABC News, federal regulators are investigating whether the longtime White House staffer used nonpublic information to profit from event contracts tied to President Donald Trump’s speeches.

headline: Oil Prices Surge 3% Amid Global Supply Crunch

article.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 17
article.summary: Oil extended a weekly advance as the escalating conflict between the US and Iran raised concerns about disruptions to supply from the Middle East.

article.title: Top Currency Forecaster Says Yen May Reach 170 Against Dollar
article.summary: The most-accurate forecaster of dollar-yen in Bloomberg’s latest rankings sees the currency sliding as far as 170 against the dollar next year, using a prediction model that largely ignores the news and focuses on technical analysis instead.
